mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, description, estimated_hours, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM tb_work_hour WHERE module_id = tm.id AND is_deleted = 0) AS used_hours FROM tb_task_module tm WHERE tm.id = #{id} AND tm.is_deleted = 0

SELECT , (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM tb_work_hour WHERE module_id = tm.id AND is_deleted = 0) AS used_hours FROM tb_task_module tm WHERE tm.project_id = #{projectId} AND tm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tm.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_task_module (project_id, name, description, estimated_hours) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{estimatedHours})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_task_module SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
